end of world model.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check early history to find the initial state
if len(history) > 0:
    # Look at the very first frame
    first_seg = history[0].frame.segmentation
    print("=== FIRST FRAME ===")
    for n in first_seg['nodes']:
        if 10 < n['pixels'] < 100:
            print(f"{n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, boundary={n['boundary']}")
    
    # Check a few transitions to see what changed
    if len(transitions) > 0:
        print(f"\n=== LAST TRANSITION ===")
        print(f"Action: {transitions[-1].action}")
        before = transitions[-1].before_frame.segmentation
        after = transitions[-1].after_frame.segmentation
        print("Before:")
        for n in before['nodes']:
            if 10 < n['pixels'] < 100:
                print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, boundary={n['boundary']}")
        print("After:")
        for n in after['nodes']:
            if 10 < n['pixels'] < 100:
                print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
